positive: A mystical and elegant celestial guardian, depicted as a stylized, mythical creature with flowing wings and bioluminescent accents. The creature is coiled around a stylized crescent moon and nebula, forming a central, symmetrical composition. The color palette should feature deep indigo, sapphire blue, iridescent silver, and touches of glowing gold. The art style should be intricate line art combined with glowing, gradient wash effects, highly detailed for printing. Clean silhouettes, strong contrast between the dark background elements and the glowing subject, suitable for apparel printing. Minimalist background elements to keep focus on the main subject.
negative: blurry, noise, artifact, text, watermark, low resolution, dirty, amateur, bad anatomy, out of frame, extra limbs
